03 January 2026 Military News

Operations
Defense Policy / Programs

News Reports

Current Operations

  • US indicts Maduro in New York court as Venezuela seeks UNSC meeting IRNA 03 Jan 2026 -- US Attorney General Pam Bondi announced Saturday that Venezuelan President Nicolás Maduro and his wife have been indicted in the Southern District of New York following a military operation to capture the couple.
  • Venezuelan president, wife indicted in New York, US Attorney General claims Global Times 03 Jan 2026 -- Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro and his wife, Cilia Flores, have been indicted in the Southern District of New York, US Attorney General Pam Bondi claimed in a X post on Saturday.

  • Trump Announces U.S. Military's Capture of Maduro DoD News 03 Jan 2026 -- President Donald J. Trump today announced the capture of Venezuelan leader Nicolás Maduro, following a successful overnight joint U.S. military extraction in Venezuela's capital of Caracas.
  • Trump Says US Captures Maduro During Strikes That Moscow, Others Denounce RFE/RL 03 Jan 2026 -- President Donald Trump said the United States has captured and holds Venezuela's Nicolas Maduro after carrying out a large-scale strike that has been sharply condemned by Iran, Russia, and other allies of the South American country.
  • Trump claims Maduro, his wife, captured, taken out of Venezuela: media report Global Times 03 Jan 2026 -- US President Donald Trump said Saturday in a Truth Social post that Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro and his wife were captured and flown out of Venezuela, the Xinhua News Agency reported.
  • Trump claims Venezuelan President Maduro kidnapped, flown out of country Press TV 03 Jan 2026 -- Venezuelan President Nicholas Maduro and his wife, Cilia Flores, have been kidnapped by US armed forces, US President Donald Trump claims, after Washington carried out a large-scale strike against the country.
  • 'Trump claims US will 'run' Venezuela in interim after kidnapping of Maduro Press TV 03 Jan 2026 -- US President Donald Trump says the United States will take control of Venezuela until a "safe, proper, and judicious" transition of power has taken place, following the kidnapping of President Nicolas Maduro.
  • Trump says US will be 'very strongly involved' in Venezuela's oil industry Press TV 03 Jan 2026 -- US President Donald Trump says Washington will play a major role in Venezuela's oil sector following a military assault that led to the kidnapping of Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro.
  • Stolen Venezuelan oil must be returned to US, JD Vance claims IRNA 03 Jan 2026 -- US Vice President JD Vance has acknowledged that Washington's military action against Venezuela is about seizing the country's vast oil reserves, saying, "the stolen oil must be returned to the United States."

  • Smith Statement on Regime Change Strike in Venezuela House Armed Services Committee - Democrats 03 Jan 2026 -- U.S. Representative Adam Smith (D-Wash.), Ranking Member of the House Armed Services Committee, released the following statement in response to President Trump's announcement regarding U.S. military activities in Venezuela.
  • Rogers Praises Successful Mission to Bring Maduro to Justice House Armed Services Committee 03 Jan 2026 -- Today, U.S. Representative Mike Rogers (R-AL), Chairman of the House Armed Services Committee, released a statement applauding the successful military mission to arrest Venezuelan dictator Nicolás Maduro. Rogers expects a full committee briefing on the operation this week.
  • Chairman Mast on Capture of Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro U.S. House of Representatives Committee on Foreign Affairs 03 Jan 2026 -- Today, House Foreign Affairs Committee Chairman Brian Mast issued the following statement following the successful U.S. military operation that led to the capture of Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro.
  • Chairman Crawford Statement on Venzuela US House of Representatives Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence 03 Jan 2026 -- House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence Chairman Rick Crawford (AR-01) released the following statement after the U.S. arrested Nicolas Maduro.
  • Ranking Member Shaheen Condemns Military Action in Venezuela US Senate Foreign Relations Committee 03 Jan 2026 -- Today, U.S. Senator Jeanne Shaheen (D-NH), Ranking Member of the Senate Foreign Relations Committee, issued a statement on the Trump Administration's military action in Venezuela.
  • Risch Statement on Maduro Capture, Venezuela Strikes US Senate Foreign Relations Committee 03 Jan 2026 -- U.S. Senator Jim Risch (R-Idaho) released the statement below regarding President Trump's recent action in Venezuela.
  • Senate Intelligence Vice Chairman Warner Responds to Military Action in Venezuela Office of Senator Mark R. Warner (D-VA) 03 Jan 2026
  • Warner, National Security Committees Ranking Members Condemn Trump Administration Plan To Run Venezuela Office of Senator Mark R. Warner (D-VA) 03 Jan 2026

  • 'Maduro Venezuela's only president; no empire will rule us': Caracas vows resistance after US kidnapping Press TV 03 Jan 2026 -- Venezuelan Vice President Delcy Rodriguez has strongly condemned an illegal US military attack that resulted in the kidnapping of President Nicolas Maduro and First Lady Cilia Flores, demanding their immediate release and warning that Venezuela is prepared to defend itself.
  • Venezuela demands UN Security Council hold an emergency meeting: Chinese media Global Times 03 Jan 2026 -- Venezuela has demanded UN Security Council hold an emergency meeting, the Xinhua News Agency reported on Saturday.
  • Venezuelan FM condemns US strikes, warns regime change efforts will fail IRNA 03 Jan 2026 -- Venezuela's Foreign Minister Yvan Eduardo Gil Pinto has strongly condemned US attacks against his country, saying they constitute a blatant violation of the United Nations Charter and pose a serious threat to international peace and security.
  • Venezuela says United States carried out military aggression on its soil IRNA 03 Jan 2026 -- The Venezuelan government says the United States has carried out a "very serious and grave military aggression" against multiple parts of the country.
  • Venezuela declares state of emergency after US strikes against civilian, military targets Press TV 03 Jan 2026 -- At least seven explosions have shaken Caracas, the capital of Venezuela, as low-flying aircraft have been detected in the skies above the city, in what the Venezuelan government said were coordinated US strikes.

  • Statement attributable to the Spokesperson for the Secretary-General - on Venezuela UN Secretary-General 03 Jan 2026
  • US actions in Venezuela 'constitute a dangerous precedent': Guterres UN News 03 Jan 2026 -- The UN Secretary-General Antonio Guterres has said he is "deeply alarmed" over the standoff between the United States and Venezuela in recent months, which culminated on Saturday morning in the capture of President Nicolás Maduro by US special forces.
  • Venezuela: UN Fact-Finding Mission expresses grave concern following US military intervention and calls for accountability for human rights violations and crimes OHCHR 03 Jan 2026 -- The Independent International Fact-Finding Mission on the Bolivarian Republic of Venezuela expressed grave concern over the human rights situation in Venezuela following the US attack and capture of Nicolás Maduro and underscored the need to ensure accountability for the grave human rights violations and crimes against humanity committed by his government.

  • Foreign Ministry statement regarding US armed aggression against Venezuela Russia Ministry of Foreign Affairs 03 Jan 2026
  • Foreign Ministry statement regarding further developments around Venezuela Russia Ministry of Foreign Affairs 03 Jan 2026
  • Foreign Ministry statement concerning developments around Venezuela Russia Ministry of Foreign Affairs 03 Jan 2026
  • Press release on Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov's telephone conversation with Vice President of the Bolivarian Republic of Venezuela Delcy Eloína Rodríguez Gómez Russia Ministry of Foreign Affairs 03 Jan 2026
  • Press release on Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov's telephone conversation with Foreign Minister of Belarus Maxim Ryzhenkov Russia Ministry of Foreign Affairs 03 Jan 2026
  • Russia Condemns US Strikes on Venezuela, Backs UNSC Emergency Meeting - Foreign Ministry Sputnik 03 Jan 2026 -- The Russian Foreign Ministry has strongly condemned the US military strikes against Venezuela, calling them an "act of armed aggression" lacking credible justification.
  • Canada reacts to the situation in Venezuela Canada 03 Jan 2026
  • Statement by Prime Minister Carney on the situation in Venezuela Prime Minister of Canada 03 Jan 2026 -- "One of the first actions taken by Canada's new government in March 2025 was to impose additional sanctions on Nicolás Maduro's brutally oppressive and criminal regime - unequivocally condemning his grave breaches of international peace and security, gross and systematic human rights violations, and corruption. Canada has not recognised the illegitimate regime of Maduro since it stole the 2018 election. The Canadian government therefore welcomes the opportunity for freedom, democracy, peace, and prosperity for the Venezuelan people.
  • Chinese military affairs experts analyze US strikes in Venezuela and operation to capture Maduro Global Times 03 Jan 2026 -- After the US military strikes on Venezuela on Saturday, which reportedly led to the capture of Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro and his wife, Chinese military affairs experts analyzed how the US Delta Force carried out the mission, while stressing the illegality of the US invasion of a sovereign state.
  • Press Release of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs regarding developments in Venezuela Romania - Ministry of Foreign Affairs 03 Jan 2026
  • Foreign Minister Margus Tsahkna: it is crucial to ensure stability and a democratic transition in Venezuela Estonia MFA 03 Jan 2026 -- We are closely monitoring developments in Venezuela, including the security and safety of Estonian citizens present there.
  • Statement regarding the situation in Venezuela Spain MFA 03 Jan 2026
  • US hegemonic acts seriously violate intl law, Venezuela's sovereignty: Chinese FM on US military strikes on Venezuela Global Times 03 Jan 2026 -- China is deeply shocked by and strongly condemns the US' blatant use of force against a sovereign state and action against its president. Such hegemonic acts of the US seriously violate international law and Venezuela's sovereignty, and threaten peace and security in Latin America and the Caribbean region. China firmly opposes it, Chinese FM spokesperson made the remarks on the US Military Strikes on Venezuela.
  • Chinese military affairs experts analyze US strikes in Venezuela and operation to capture Maduro Global Times 03 Jan 2026 -- After the US military strikes on Venezuela on Saturday, which reportedly led to the capture of Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro and his wife, Chinese military affairs experts analyzed how the US Delta Force carried out the mission, while stressing the illegality of the US invasion of a sovereign state.
  • Foreign Ministry Spokesperson's Remarks on the U.S. Military Strikes on Venezuela PRC MofA 03 Jan 2026
  • Statement from Minister Eide on the Situation in Venezuela Government of Norway 03 Jan 2026
  • Condemnations pour in over US military attack on Venezuela IRNA 03 Jan 2026
  • Iran strongly condemns US military aggression against Venezuela IRNA 03 Jan 2026 -- The Iranian Foreign Ministry has strongly condemned the United States' military aggression against Venezuela and the blatant violation of the country's national sovereignty and territorial integrity, saying that the attack represents a flagrant violation of regional and international peace and security.
  • US kidnapping of Venezuela's president 'clear instance of state terrorism': FM Press TV 03 Jan 2026 -- Iran's foreign minister has sharply condemned the United States' military aggression against Venezuela and the kidnapping of President Nicolas Maduro and his wife, describing the move as a "clear instance of state terrorism" and a blatant violation of the Venezuelan people's sovereignty.
  • No: 1, 3 January 2026, Regarding the Recent Developments in Venezuela Republic of Turkey Ministry of Foreign Affairs 03 Jan 2026
  • Condemnations pour in after US bombing of Venezuela, kidnapping of Maduro Press TV 03 Jan 2026 -- An outpouring of condemnation has followed US President Donald Trump's announcement that the United States had carried out a "large-scale military strike" against Venezuela and abducted its leader, President Nicolas Maduro.
  • PM statement on Venezuela: 3 January 2026 Gov.UK 03 Jan 2026

Defense Policy / Programs

  • The President Held a Meeting in Kyiv with the National Security Advisors of the Coalition of the Willing States President of Ukraine 03 Jan 2026
  • Weapons, corps-based structure, enhanced protection, digitalization, and more: the Ministry of Defence's key highlights of 2025 Ukraine MOD 03 Jan 2026
  • The Ministry of Defence secured over $6 billion for Ukraine's defense industry in 2025 Ukraine MOD 03 Jan 2026

  • Pakistan Air Force has successfully conducted the flight test of the indigenously developed Taimoor Weapon System, marking another significant milestone in the advancement of national aerospace and defence capabilities. ISPR Pakistan 03 Jan 2026
  • On night 2/3 January 2026, a Snow Clearance Operation was conducted, using heavy machinery to open Burzil Pass to facilitate operational movement of own forces in the area. ISPR Pakistan 03 Jan 2026

  • With Participation of Troops from the Ground, Air, and Sea: Large-Scale Exercise Completed By the 80th Division Israel Defense Forces 03 Jan 2026

Defense Industry

Other Conflicts


    Ukraine Conflict News

  • 5 countries assume responsibilities as UN Security Council non-permanent members People's Daily 03 Jan 2026 -- Bahrain, Colombia, the Democratic Republic of the Congo, Latvia and Liberia on Friday began to assume responsibilities as non-permanent members of the UN Security Council.

    • Operation Iron Swords / Operation Al-Aqsa Flood | Operation Northern Arrows | Giddeon's Chariots

  • Israel conducts multiple airstrikes across south Lebanon, violating ceasefire Press TV 03 Jan 2026 -- Israeli occupation forces have carried out multiple airstrikes across southern Lebanon, in a renewed violation of the ceasefire agreement reached between Hezbollah and Israel in late November 2024.

  • UN rights chief urges halt to Israeli plan to legalize execution of Palestinians Press TV 03 Jan 2026 -- UN human rights chief urged the Israeli regime to halt plans to impose mandatory death sentences exclusively on Palestinians, warning the proposal violates international law and entrenches discriminatory justice.

    • Other Conflicts

  • Strikes on Daesh UK MOD 03 Jan 2026 -- Royal Air Force aircraft have completed successful strikes against Daesh in a joint operation with France.

  • The Kingdom of Morocco says it is closely and keenly following the latest developments in the sister Republic of Yemen, reiterating- based on its firm belief in the foundations of international law and the principles of good neighborliness and respect for the integrity and sovereignty of states- its unwavering support for the national unity of the sister Republic of Yemen and its sovereignty over its entire territory, as well as the Yemeni people's right to security and stability. Morocco Ministry of Foreign Affairs 03 Jan 2026
  • The General Secretariat of the Organization of Islamic Cooperation Commends Saudi Arabia's Initiative to Hold a Conference in Riyadh on the Situation in Yemen Organization of Islamic Cooperation (OIC) 03 Jan 2026 -- The Secretary-General of the Organization of Islamic Cooperation (OIC), Mr
  • Pakistan Expresses Support for the Unity and Territorial Integrity of Yemen Pakistan Ministry of Foreign Affairs 03 Jan 2026 -- Pakistan welcomes the call by Yemen's Presidential Leadership Council to hold comprehensive talks in Riyadh and once again urges all Yemeni stakeholders to engage in good faith toward a negotiated political solution based on agreed parameters.
  • No: 2, 3 January 2026, Regarding the Recent Developments in the Republic of Yemen Republic of Turkey Ministry of Foreign Affairs 03 Jan 2026
  • All UAE Military Personnel Leave Yemen - Defense Ministry Sputnik 03 Jan 2026 -- All military personnel of the United Arab Emirates (UAE) have withdrawn from Yemen in accordance with the Emirati leadership's decision to cease participation in the counter-terrorism operation in the country, the UAE Defense Ministry said.
  • Saudi Arabia Welcomes Yemeni Presidential Leadership Council President's Request to Convene Conference in Riyadh for All Southern Factions SPA 03 Jan 2026 -- In response to the request of President of the Yemeni Presidential Leadership Council Dr. Rashad Al-Alimi to convene a comprehensive conference in Riyadh to bring together all southern factions to discuss just solutions to the southern cause

  • Press Remarks by the Spokesperson Pakistan Ministry of Foreign Affairs 03 Jan 2026 -- In response to media queries regarding remarks made by the Indian Minister of External Affairs about Pakistan, the Spokesperson of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs, Mr. Tahir Andrabi, stated the following:

News Reports

  • The Police Request that a Crew Member of the Fitburg Cargo Vessel Be Subjected to Pre-Trial Detention Police of Finland 03 Jan 2026 -- One of the two crew members currently arrested, the Russian national has been subjected to a travel ban as of 03 January 2026. The police will request that the other one, the Azerbaijani national be subjected to pre-trial detention.

  • Japan confirms 1st bird flu outbreak in 2026 People's Daily 03 Jan 2026 -- Japan's agriculture ministry said on Friday that it has confirmed an outbreak of highly pathogenic avian influenza at a poultry farm in Miyazaki Prefecture in southern Japan, marking the country's first case in 2026 and the 13th outbreak this season.

  • Foreign Ministry Spokesperson's Remarks on Taoiseach of Ireland Micheál Martin's Upcoming Visit to China PRC MofA 03 Jan 2026
  • China's largest offshore gas field produces 4.5-mln-tonnes oil equivalent in 2025 Global Times 03 Jan 2026 -- China's largest offshore gas field, named Deep Sea No. 1, has recently completed its 100th shipment of crude oil since being put into production, announced the China National Offshore Oil Corporation (CNOOC) on Friday.
  • Suspected rocket debris with China flag recovered off Sulu Philippine News Agency 03 Jan 2026 -- The Philippine Coast Guard (PCG) on Saturday said a suspected rocket debris bearing a Chinese flag was recovered off the coast of Sulu.
  • Number of China's space launches reaches a new record of 92 in 2025: report Global Times 03 Jan 2026 -- China carried out a record 92 space launches in 2025, with multiple breakthroughs and a number of firsts across manned spaceflight, deep-space exploration and commercial spaceflight achieved, CCTV News reported on Saturday, citing the China National Space Administration.

  • Analysis on China's Cyber Threats to Taiwan's Critical Infrastructure in 2025 ROC NSB 03 Jan 2026 -- China's cyber army has long been engaging in cyberattacks against Taiwan's critical infrastructure (CI) by employing diverse and evolving tactics. To enhance public understanding on the development of emerging cybersecurity threats, the National Security Bureau (NSB) has recently compiled the report titled "Analysis on China's Cyber Threats to Taiwan's Critical Infrastructure in 2025."
  • PLA's exercises simulate blocking energy, foreign aid: U.S. institute CNA 03 Jan 2026 -- China's military drills around Taiwan earlier this week signaled potential strategies to cut the island off from energy supplies and foreign military assistance, according to a recent United States think tank report.
  • DPP lawmakers seek to codify 'two-state' framing in cross-strait law CNA 03 Jan 2026 -- About 25 Democratic Progressive Party (DPP) lawmakers are proposing amendments to Taiwan's governing law on cross-strait relations to codify a "two-state" reality, drawing immediate pushback from the opposition Kuomintang (KMT).
  • Mainland official calls for peaceful development of cross-Strait relations People's Daily 03 Jan 2026 -- A Chinese mainland official on Friday called for efforts to promote peaceful development of relations across the Taiwan Strait and achieve national reunification.
  • PLA activities in the waters and airspace around Taiwan ROC MND 03 Jan 2026

  • S.Korean President Lee receives interview with Chinese media at Cheong Wa Dae, reaffirms one-China stance on Taiwan question ahead of China visit Global Times 03 Jan 2026 -- Before starting his visit to China, South Korean President Lee Jae-myung gave an interview with CCTV News that aired on Friday, during which he said deeper cooperation between South Korea and China can open a broad gateway of opportunity for South Korea. Regarding the Taiwan question, Lee said South Korea will, as always, uphold its position of respecting for the one-China stance.

  • Respected Comrade Kim Jong Un's Congratulatory Speech to Young People and Soldier-builders Engaged in Construction of Sinuiju Combined Greenhouse Farm KCNA 03 Jan 2026 -- The respected Comrade Kim Jong Un made a congratulatory speech to the young people and soldier-builders engaged in the construction of the Sinuiju Combined Greenhouse Farm.
  • Respected Comrade Kim Jong Un Visits Construction Site of Sinuiju Greenhouse Complex to Encourage Young Builders KCNA 03 Jan 2026 -- Kim Jong Un , general secretary of the Workers' Party of Korea and president of the State Affairs of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea, visited the construction site of the Sinuiju Greenhouse Complex on Jan. 2 to congratulate and encourage all the young vanguard members and soldier-builders who greeted the significant new year in the struggle to glorify the Ninth Congress of the WPK with proud labour achievements.

  • Iran: Statement by the spokesperson on developments across the country European External Action Service (EEAS) 03 Jan 2026 -- We follow closely the unfolding situation across Iran, with demonstrations reflecting the demands of many Iranians. We are concerned by the reported deaths and injuries and urge Iran's security forces to exercise maximum restraint in handling peaceful protests. Socio-economic challenges were acknowledged by authorities and should be addressed through inclusive dialogue, not through violence.
  • Iran: Statement by the Spokesperson on developments across the country European Commission 03 Jan 2026
  • Iran widens food subsidy coverage amid rising living costs Press TV 03 Jan 2026 -- The Iranian government has announced a major expansion of its food coupon program to help ease pressure on consumers from rising staple food prices.
  • Leader hails bazaaris as most loyal to Islamic Republic, says foes behind currency devaluation Press TV 03 Jan 2026 -- Leader of the Islamic Revolution Ayatollah Seyyed Ali Khamenei says the national currency devaluation is "unnatural" and involves "the hand of the enemy."
  • Iran Pushes Back At Trump As Protests Over Economic Crisis Intensify RFE/RL 03 Jan 2026 -- As protests over Iran's economic crisis near their second week, top Iranian officials and US President Donald Trump have exchanged threats as demonstrations turned deadly and continue to escalate.
  • Trump's anti-Iran threats stem from desperation: IRGC IRNA 03 Jan 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) has issued a statement, emphasizing that recent threats by US President Donald Trump against Iran reflect desperation. The IRGC has also reaffirmed its commitment to defend the Islamic nation and counter ongoing hostile plots.
  • IRGC says Trump's threats stem from desperation, vows to defeat all plots Press TV 03 Jan 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guard Corps (IRGC) says US President Donald Trump is threatening Iran out of desperation, emphasizing that IRGC forces will remain ready to sacrifice their lives until all hybrid plots are defeated.
  • Foreign ministry condemns interventionist statements of US officials on Iran IRNA 03 Jan 2026 -- The Iranian Foreign Ministry in a statement condemned the interventionist statements of US President Donald Trump and other American officials regarding Iran's internal affairs.
  • Iran sends letter to UNSC, condemns Trump's 'reckless, interventionist' remarks IRNA 03 Jan 2026 -- Iran's Ambassador and Permanent Representative to the United Nations Amir Saeid Iravani has strongly rejected and condemned US President Donald Trump's "reckless, interventionist, and inflammatory statements," saying that such repeated statements demonstrate a consistent pattern of unlawful conduct by the United States and constitute a clear, explicit, and unlawful threat of the use of force against a sovereign state.
  • Iran says US assassination of Gen. Soleimani was a cowardly act of terrorism Press TV 03 Jan 2026 -- Iran has condemned the United States' 2020 assassination of Lieutenant General Soleimani as a "cowardly act of terrorism" and a blatant violation of international law, calling for full accountability for this unlawful act.
  • Iranian border guards repel terrorist infiltration attempt near Saravan IRNA 03 Jan 2026 -- Iranian border guards clashed with a terrorist group along the border strip of Saravan County in southeastern Sistan and Baluchestan Province, successfully preventing the group from infiltrating the country, a senior border official has said.
  • Iranian border guards smash terrorist cell, seize firearms in Sistan and Baluchestan Press TV 03 Jan 2026 -- Iranian border guards have managed to disband a Takfiri terrorist cell in a border area in the country's southeastern province of Sistan and Baluchestan and successfully seized military-grade weapons from the militants.
